## Pick #1 — Score: 8/10

**Pope Leo Issues AI Ethics Encyclical, Calls for Human-Centered Development**
*Google News - Technology + 5 more*
[Read the full article →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
**Live Pick:** true

**Why it matters:**
Pope Leo has released what appears to be a landmark papal encyclical specifically addressing artificial intelligence — a rare and significant move that plants the Catholic Church squarely in the middle of the most consequential tech debate of our time. His call to 'disarm' AI and prevent power concentration lands as Silicon Valley is drunk on AGI hype and regulators worldwide are still fumbling for a framework. When the Pope writes an encyclical about your industry, you've officially stopped being a niche conversation.

**Hook:**
The Pope just weighed in on AI / 'Disarm it,' he says / Silicon Valley, you've been warned
